creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #4)
On my i7-6700k building qt5-webengine 5.9.5 for aarch64 took ~9 minutes more than for amd64 (53 min vs. 44 min). Is that much? Or did you build jails without -x (native-xtools) which provides major speedup?

If you don't want to I can test for you. OTOH, I'm not gonna waste time on amd64/i386 instead as that would be your job. ;)
